word: H6495 - פְּקַח־קֹוחַ - pᵉqach-qôwach - pek-akh-ko'-akh - Opening of the prison

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּקח־קוח

Transliteration: peqach-qôach

Phonetic: pek-akh-ko'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. opening (of eyes), wide

Origin: from H6491 redoubled

TWOT entry: 1803b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
